holdings.infoBox: VYM is an equity ETF with a total of 618 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 8.49%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.13%, Exxon Mobil at 2.52%, Johnson & Johnson at 2.23%, and Cisco Systems at 1.97%.

overview.description: The Vanguard High Dividend Yield Index ETF (VYM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Custom High Dividend Yield index. The fund tracks the FTSE High Dividend Yield Index. The index selects high-dividend-paying US companies, excluding REITS, and weights them by market cap. VYM was launched on Nov 10, 2006 and is issued by Vanguard.
